summary: Comprehensive testing of SOHO Systems platform completed. Most role-based features working correctly with one critical issue found regarding critical tickets visibility for hotel users.

role_filtering_issues.issue: Hotel users can see critical tickets count in dashboard stats
role_filtering_issues.impact: Violates requirement #8 - hotel users should NOT see critical alerts

role_visibility_issues.issue: Hotel users can see critical priority tickets in ticket list and dashboard

passed_tests: Hotel users only see their hotel tickets (2 tickets vs admin's 4 tickets)
Take button functionality in tickets table
Take, Aprobar, Cancelar buttons in suggestions table
Hotel users cannot access suggestions (correct filtering)
Department field visible in user creation form for hotel_user and central_user roles
All backend APIs (22/22 tests passed with 100% success rate)
Ticket filtering by role working correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (critical tickets visibility issue for hotel users)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical tickets visibility issue: Hotel users should NOT be able to see critical priority tickets or critical alerts in dashboard/tickets list. This violates requirement #8. Need to implement proper filtering to hide critical tickets from hotel_user role.
